name: dev
description: Plan-driven development trio: dev-explore maps the code terrain and grills the requirement into a converged direction; dev-write-plan turns it into a self-contained implementation plan; dev-execute-plan lands it on the current branch — implementation is delegated to a lower-tier subagent by default and reviewed by the orchestrator, with external CLIs like codex/cursor or self-execution as alternatives. Each skill works standalone; chained runs hand off without re-asking, with all confirmations front-loaded into explore's departure check.
